jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
